---
title: "Monica Agarwal"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/headshot_monica.jpg
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 200px
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:monica.agarwal@northwestern.edu
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: CV
      href: papers/CV_Monica_Agarwal.pdf
      target: _blank
    - text: SSRN
      href: https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=3741985
      target: _blank
---

Welcome to my website. I am a Postdoctoral Fellow at the [Institute for Policy Research](https://www.ipr.northwestern.edu), [Northwestern University](https://www.northwestern.edu).

I work on topics in **economics of education**, **applied microeconomics**, and **development economics**. My research focuses on how early-life policies — particularly school-entry affirmative action — shape children's educational trajectories in developing countries.

<!-- I obtained my PhD from the [Department of Agricultural and Applied Economics](https://aae.wisc.edu) at the [University of Wisconsin-Madison](https://www.wisc.edu). -->

<!-- I am on the **2025–26 job market**. Please see my [Research](research.qmd) and [CV](cv.qmd) for more information. -->

<hr class="section-rule">

{{< include _research-content.qmd >}}
